faqs.question: How much does cricket control cost in Passaic, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our cricket control services in Passaic range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What types of crickets are common in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Passaic residents most commonly encounter house crickets, field crickets, and camel crickets. House crickets are attracted to warmth and often enter homes through cracks and gaps, while camel crickets prefer damp basements and crawl spaces common in older Passaic buildings.

faqs.question: How quickly can you eliminate a cricket infestation?
faqs.answer: Most cricket infestations in Passaic homes can be significantly reduced within 24-48 hours of treatment, with complete elimination typically achieved within one week. We use targeted insecticides, exclusion techniques, and environmental modifications to ensure long-lasting results.

faqs.question: Do you service both residential and commercial properties in Passaic?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide cricket control services for all property types in Passaic, including single-family homes, apartment buildings, restaurants, warehouses, and commercial facilities throughout the city. Our flexible scheduling accommodates both residential and business needs.
